name: input-file
visual_summary: The input-file component is a standard input element for uploading files. It is a basic form component used for file uploads in an application. Typically, it is placed within a form and can be used anywhere user input is required, such as during profile creation or file import processes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-file
Description: The input-file component is a standard input element for uploading files. It is a basic form component used for file uploads in an application. Typically, it is placed within a form and can be used anywhere user input is required, such as during profile creation or file import processes.
Style: e.g. default, customizable
Interactions: 
Tags: ui, input, file, upload, form

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
